name: LOAN GOAT | #1 Hard Money Lender
description_short: Veteran-owned hard money and private lending firm specializing in residential and commercial real estate loans with fast closings and non-traditional qualification.
description_long:
Loan Goat Inc. is a veteran-owned private and hard money lender headquartered in San Diego, California, operating under the brand "Loan Goat #1 Hard Money Lender." The company was founded to serve real estate investors and borrowers who cannot qualify for or obtain timely funding through traditional banking channels. The firm has built its reputation on speed, flexibility, and personalized service in the private lending space.

Loan Goat offers four primary loan products: private money loans, hard money loans, non-traditional loans, and specialized veterans loans. Their services are designed for real estate transactions including fix-and-flip projects, bridge financing, cash-out refinancing, and investment property purchases. The company markets itself as capable of closing loans in as little as 10-15 business days, positioning speed as a competitive advantage over traditional mortgage lenders. They serve both residential and commercial borrowers across multiple states, including markets with complex regulations like New York.

The company differentiates itself through personalized account management, with named loan officers (Milad Shamoun and Blair Noble mentioned prominently) who provide hands-on guidance throughout the lending process. Customer testimonials highlight their willingness to work with non-traditional financial situations, explain loan mechanics to first-time borrowers, and salvage deals that fell through with traditional lenders. They also emphasize their veteran ownership status as part of their brand identity and values proposition.

As a private/hard money lender, Loan Goat operates in a higher-cost lending segment with rates and terms significantly different from conventional mortgages. Borrowers should expect higher interest rates, shorter loan terms, and asset-based rather than credit-score-based qualification. The company's strength lies in speed and flexibility for time-sensitive deals, not in competitive pricing. This product is appropriate for investors and borrowers in specific situations, not for standard home purchases by credit-qualified borrowers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Closes loans in 10-15 business days, significantly faster than traditional lenders
Veteran-owned company with stated commitment to this demographic
Willing to work with non-traditional financial situations and borrowers traditional banks reject
Named account managers (Milad Shamoun, Blair Noble) provide hands-on, personalized service
Covers multiple states and complex regulatory markets (specifically mentioned New York)
Serves both residential and commercial real estate investors
Google-verified customer reviews consistently praise professionalism and problem-solving
cons: Hard money and private loans carry significantly higher interest rates than conventional mortgages
Limited public pricing information available on website; requires quote request for specific terms
Short loan terms typical of hard money products create higher monthly payment obligations
Not suitable for primary residence purchases or credit-qualified borrowers seeking best rates
Asset-based lending means property value and equity matter more than credit history, limiting accessibility
best_for: Real estate investors doing fix-and-flip projects who need fast capital deployment
Borrowers in time-sensitive deals where traditional bank timelines would cause loss of opportunity
Veterans seeking specialized lending products with veteran-owned company backing
Commercial real estate borrowers with non-traditional financial profiles excluded by conventional lenders
diagnosis: Loan Goat is best suited for real estate investors, business owners, and borrowers in time-sensitive situations who cannot qualify for or wait for traditional mortgage financing. The critical caveat is that hard money and private loans cost significantly more than conventional mortgages—this is a premium product for speed and flexibility, not competitive pricing, and should only be used when traditional lending timelines or qualification standards make it impossible to proceed.
services: Private money loans for real estate transactions
Hard money loans for investment properties
Non-traditional loans for borrowers with unusual financial situations
Bridge financing and bridge cash-out refinancing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3030 El Cajon Blvd, San Diego, CA 92104
